review_text: Spent 5 nights here and enjoyed our time. Park is well kept, best amenities, sites are a good size. Beach on both sides. Close to Shoal and Fingal bays. Will stay again.

Boom gate hasn’t worked called after hours office and was told it was our fault and that it was a $350 fine to get the boom gate to work. We now have to carry all of our camping gear in the dark and we are six young girls, this is ridiculous.

absolutely fantastic! Lovely friendly people who couldn’t be more helpful. Amenities are 5🌟and so clean. sites are plentiful but the park is still quiet and peaceful. Swimming on both sides of the park. We walked to Shoal bay and Nelson Bay in about 30 minutes. Highly recommend. We will be back 🌟🌟🌟🌟🌟

Our cabin was comfortable.
The bed was very comfortable.
The sheer and blockout blinds are a good touch.

Halifax Holiday Park is hard to fault. The amenities are some of the cleanest and most modern I’ve ever seen in a caravan park. The shared kitchen space is excellent, with a large flat-screen TV, and the toilets and showers were always spotless, bright, and fully equipped.
The staff are incredibly friendly and helpful. We had a bit of trouble setting up our camper van, and they went above and beyond to assist us—even helping guide it down into place.
A pool would be a nice addition, but honestly, the location more than makes up for it. With such an amazing selection of nearby beaches, you’re spoiled for choice.
We’ll definitely be back—highly recommended!
Great location & fair rates for caravaners.
Great location and very good admin staff.

Had an amazing stay at Halifax Holiday Park in Nelson Bay! Clean, comfortable cabins, friendly staff, and great facilities for the kids. Perfect location close to beaches and activities. Highly recommend for a family getaway!

Halifax Holiday Park in Nelson Bay was a fantastic getaway and exceeded my expectations. The location is absolutely perfect, with just a short walk to the beach as well as the local shops, cafes, and everything you need for a relaxing stay. It made the whole trip feel easy and convenient without needing to drive everywhere.

Overall, the experience was wonderful and truly great value for money. The park was welcoming, well-positioned, and made for a stress-free holiday. A special thank you to the lovely staff, who were friendly, helpful, and made the entire experience smooth and enjoyable from start to finish.

I thoroughly enjoyed my stay and would happily return again in the future. Highly recommend Halifax Holiday Park to anyone looking for a relaxing and affordable stay in Nelson Bay.
Great beach

We stayed in Halifax Holiday Park in our own caravan. The location is excellent, situated between Little Beach, Boat ramp and Shoal Bay Beach headland. Close to the Nelson Bay shops with just a 20min walk. Right near the lighthouse and is home to the Inner Light Tearooms which is great for breaky, brunch or lunch, although it's a walk up the hill but really too close to drive. Check-in was a breeze and the staff here are very attentive. All facilities are near new and very clean. No pool but you don't need it with the proximity of the beaches. Large van sites as well for new tandem axle vans.
Perfectly located on the doorstep of Little Beach. Great camping sites and one of the best amenities blocks

Phots are of places around the area.
This park is in a prime position and is clean, well maintained and close to a few beaches (walking distance).
If you’re coming to Nelson Bay this is the place to stay.

We booked accommodation at the last minute for the weekend. ||The park itself is well maintained and very clean. The bathrooms / toilets are modern and a lot nicer than I've seen at other holiday parks. My 3 year old really enjoyed the playground. The beaches surrounding the park are within walking distance and are lovely. The service we received was wonderful and the reception staff went out of their way to find a suitable space for us to park our boat at the last minute. ||My only criticism is we stayed in a 2 Bedroom Standard Villa which is quite dated and the paint is peeling off the cabinetry and from the bathroom tiles. The combined bath / shower had some sort of plaster or silicone dried at the bottom of it near the drain so I didn't want to put my son in the bath. The mattress on the bed seemed like it was a cheap foam mattress from Clark Rubber etc. and I didn't find it comfortable at all. I considered going home after the first night but stuck it out because my son was having such a great time.||We had friends staying in a few 2 Bedroom Budget Villa's and they were much nicer and had modern bathrooms. I assume they are newer than the standard villas. They paid significantly less for a 4 night booking than what we paid for our 3 night booking (we left 1 day earlier than they did). ||Overall we had a great time and we will be back to stay in a Budget Cabin :)

Top Campingplatz. Wir hatten einen Platz auf dem Kunstrasen und waren sehr zufrieden. Die Sanitären Anlagen waren modern und sauber, auch die Campkitchen und die Grill-Stationen im Aussenbereich. Negativ: Fast alle Waschmaschinen waren defekt.
Die Lage mi den 2 Stränden ist top.

Location is great. So close to two beaches.  Amenities are new and really good with large rainwater shower heads. Park is well maintained and clean.  BUT there is very little shade on our site or most other sites and we absolutely baked. To dispose of rubbish it needs to be taken to the one dump point at the entrance to the park. This was a quite a distance from our site. Only having one rubbish disposal location shows a lack of care for their patrons with the priority being the convenience of park management. I would never stay here again.
Great spot. Facilities are the best in the business. Fun spot
Amenities are great clean park is well maintained

Great spot near the beach, fly point reserve and Tomaree walk.

Facilities are top quality and staff very friendly and helpful. We were in an unpowered campsite. The site was perfect: very spacious, level and was on a mat. The camp kitchen and toilets/showers are of a high standard.
This is a great holiday park with great location. Amenities were amongst the best, if not the best for a holiday park, neat, new and clean. Large enough sites as well.

We stayed at Halifax Holiday Park for 4 weeks in our caravan on a powered caravan site, and overall our experience was fantastic.

One of the standout features of this park is the location. The park has direct access on the far western side to Shoal Bay Beach, which honestly makes it feel like your own private little spot. On the other side is Little Beach, which is perfect for families with young kids – calm water, no waves, and a great place for them to safely play.

The park community is always welcoming and friendly, which really adds to the experience, especially for longer stays. The grounds are well looked after, the park is consistently clean, and the amenities are always well maintained and sanitary.

A special mention has to go to Kristy, the current park manager. She is absolutely amazing – almost every day she would walk through the park, say hello, check in on guests, and genuinely make sure everyone was happy and looked after. That personal touch really makes a difference and shows how much care goes into running the park.

We’ve loved our time here and would happily recommend Halifax Holiday Park to families, couples, and anyone looking for a relaxed, friendly stay in a beautiful part of the coast.

- Greg & Rita

Warning to dog owners. The grass is full of bindi and if you don't want a vets bill, keep doggo on concrete. There's a beach- no dogs allowed. Van site (we had and there were others) very small and the most expensive venue we stayed at in a 4000k plus tour up and down NSW. Ameneties were not attended to overnight and were dirty in the morning. Soap at the sinks ran out.  If you have a dog, avoid. It's not dog friendly. If you have kids and no dog, keep your shoes on on the 'grass'. Bonus for non-dog campers- you can go to the beach which is superb. Altogether a poor experience and bad value. For us, a complete ripoff.

Absolutely appalled at this caravan park, you pay $325 a night for a shower that leaks with no pressure, we complained and they sent someone to fix it, they fixed the pressure but cut out hot water off completely. They made us park our second car out of the facility and I am pregnant. We also found someone’s wallet and ID wrapped in our sheets which indicates they never changed our sheets. To make matters worse my sister fell off the top bunk because it is not kid friendly AT ALL. The bunk beds weren’t made which just states laziness.  Well never be back here again, do not come here.

This was our second Christmas at Halifax and already have our site re-booked for 2026. All the staff are so friendly and helpful. The location is amazing - with direct access to the beach, tucked away at the end so away from a lot of the other beach users. Easy walk into Nelson Bay.
Text communication is great, letting us know what the seafood man or others are coming through. Excellent sized sites - unlike other van parks - you aren’t going to touch your neighbours van with your window open. Dog friendly even during peak season which is a must for us. Can’t wait for 2026 Christmas to be back again
Great clean park, close to beach.

Outstanding !!
Amenities
Staff attitute and knowledge of rebooking
location
Size of yr site
💝👍

We stayed at Halifax holiday park from 16-22 November 2025.
Loved everything about this great park. Facilities, van sites, gardens, services, everything was first class. Congratulations to all concerned we will definitely be back.
Great holiday destination. Dual beach access is amazing.

We stayed for a week over the Christmas period. The facilities are modern and in great condition. Unfortunately, because it was peak holiday season, the women’s bathrooms were often unclean due to the high volume of use. On one occasion there was poo in the shower drain, and on multiple occasions toilets were left blocked with toilet paper and waste, as well as toilet paper on the floor. When the cleaners had been through, everything was great - but the difference was noticeable during the periods between cleaning.

Obviously this isn’t the camp’s fault; however, due to the number of families staying at the time, the park felt chaotic. There were many young children riding bikes and scooters along the paths and roads, often directly towards you / cars & sometimes unaccompanied by an adult. If you don’t have kids or prefer a calmer environment, I’d recommend visiting outside of school holidays.

The WiFi does not work properly (staff are aware of this), and there was limited mobile service. This isn’t usually an issue; however, for a one-week stay it did become inconvenient at times.

Finally, we booked our one-week stay in advance, which was quite expensive for a tent site ($945), and were not allowed to extend our stay unless we paid for another full week. This was disappointing, as we only wanted to stay an additional three days, making the cost difficult to justify - so we cut our holiday short.

That said, the location is lovely, with the beach and café only a two-minute walk away, and the reception staff were very friendly.

Emplacement trouvé en dernière minute pour notre camping car et nos deux bébés.
Un peu cher et un peu serré avec les autres emplacements mais beaucoup de positif : accès à la plage en 30s, parc de jeux, propre, calme, et du jamais vu en camping une baignoire pour les bains des bébés ! (Un incroyable plus!)
We stayed here for 2 nights with a trailer. Best campsite we've stayed at so far, amenities were impeccably clean and organized, staff was very friendly, overall great experience !

Great destination ♡♡♡
Never disappoint great team FOH staff😍
A great spot to camp. Amenities clean and tidy. Park right next to beach and town not far.
Had a powered site. Good security, codes for amenities and gates. Very clean facilities. Next to an idyllic beach.
Good place to stay, close to shops and beach.

I would say this is the best holiday park in Nelson's Bay. We absolutely love the small beach it's next to, so perfect for kids and fishing! The check-in process was SO easy. The staff were friendly, the sites were big. Thank you team!

We are here for 4 weeks every year with our awesome group of vanners & always enjoy ourselves, booked in for next year as well. If you want to stay then book in early and get the best plot!
Lovely staff & easy to make friends in such a great environment.
Beaches are close as are the shops, all within walking distance.
It was great and the facilities and play equipment was fantastic.
Access to both Shoal Bay and Little Beach. Great facilities in the amenities.
My favorite park has something for everyone
Great caravan park within walking distance to the beach and boat ramp. Always neat clean and tidy with very helpful staff. Caters for tents as well as small or large vans and motorhomes
Great park in the best location. Beaches either side, very quiet at night. A mite expensive on top of all the parking meters everywhere in the district,but  we enjoyed our stay.

Unless you enjoy screaming kids and barking dogs this is not the place for you. Clean park good clean amenities Good location. Sleepy town not much happening most busineeses close early Not what you expect from a tourists location
A lovely park in a great location,  for this time of year > nice and quiet at night.
Perfect location
Perfect location, spotless with great facilities, and right on a safe beach, with no road to cross. Very family friendly, and certainly the best caravan park I have stayed in

⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️

We had a great stay at Halifax Holiday Park! The area is very clean and well maintained, with plenty of space between sites which makes it feel comfortable and not overcrowded. The rules are clear and helpful, especially the quiet hours from 10pm to 7am — it made for a peaceful night’s rest.

The location is fantastic, close to shops and essentials, yet still feels relaxing and away from the hustle. The staff are very friendly and welcoming, which really makes the stay even better. A water boiler for guests would be a wonderful addition. The playground could also be bigger, as more options for kids would make it even more family-friendly.

Overall, a generous, well-kept park with a welcoming atmosphere. Would happily return and recommend to others looking for a clean, convenient, and family-friendly holiday park.
This park is the most well presented park i have been to , lovely chek in people , roomy van slabs and accomodation is 100% also , highly recommend
Fantastic facilities. New and clean. Very helpful staff. Loved it! ❤️
There is a good reason why you need to book ahead for this park. Very popular as a result of the professionalism by staff, cleanliness of the entire area and location location location
Perfect location, cabins great, service fantastic
Didn't stay in cabin friends did and it was great, caravan sites large and amenities were un unbelievably clean. Great place to relax
Great location, fantastic facilities and friendly staff. We will return again.
Great place, that's why we come back
Hired 3 bedroomed cabins..the wash pipes were very noisy but right on the beach..comfy beds no electric blankets, limited utensils in kitchen..camp kitchen looked great

Traveling in caravan for 3 weeks through national parks and outback NSW. This was luxury with the feel of still being away from it all. Nature and beach access on doorstep. Great amenities. Super smiling helpful staff, great prices. Super sunset, birds, bike rides, walks. Five star. Want to come back already. Possibly nicest caravan park we’ve ever been to.
We stayed on a slab site with our 8mtr caravan. Nice site grass area too. Only down point was rubbish bins were only at the front of the property. Long walk for some

Powered caravan site was large with room to move
Staff very helpful
Plenty of stuff to see and do
Picture is across the road from park
Beautiful spot and private beach access big family for visiting here highly recommend

A great van park with plenty of cabins. The amenities are first rate and the park has two dump points, there's that. Excellent location with direct access to beach and plenty of nearby shops and bazaars.

Highly recommend this park. 5/5

The reception staff are wonderful.From initial check in on Monday with Sharne to having to extend our stay for 3 nights with Jo being so kind and understanding and letting us move sites today instead of tomorrow.This is our first time at this park and will most definitely be coming back to stay here again.The amenities are always clean and tidy also which is a big draw card.Do yourself a favour and book a stay in this great park. 👍🙂

Caravan stay for 3 nights. The amenities are 5 stars but the roads within the park are very narrow, making parking our van a squeeze. Despite the park not being full we had two caravans opposite us and one next to us. Parking of cars in front of vans didn’t make it easy to reverse into our spot.
Also please inform guests that the only rubbish bins are at the exit to the park, beware of the Bin Chickens.
The say was in our van a bit windy and rainy. But still had a good time.
Love this place

Fantastic location and facilities. Staff went above and beyond to make sure we were comfortable and happy. Magnificent camp kitchen with big TV, gas log fire, all cooking appliances, fridges, freezers, everything. Great.
Van site was perfect, a short stroll through the gate to the beach. Amenities were clean and modern

We have stayed in many holiday parks around Australia, but i think i can honestly say this is one of the best parks we have stayed in touch date.
Staff are very friendly and accommodating.
We originally booked for 2 nights on a powered and water site and ended up staying for 5.
Very clean and modern amenities.
Large sites,
Clean and modern bbq/ kitchen areas.
Dog friendly
Short walk to the picturesque Shoal Bay, great for sunrise strolls.
Short stroll up to Nelson Head lighthouse, which had a lovely cafe with beautiful views.
Close to town and marina.

Love, love this place. We will definitely be back to stay.

If you are looking for a quiet place to stay, look no further.
Didn't stay as cabins were to dear! Mid week off season. Checked in and all of them were empty, comon reflections.
Centrally located caravan park to visit Nelson Bay

Camped here over the June Long weekend, Great location.
When we booked we were told we booked the last spots, though over the weekend there were at least a dozen vacant sites.
The rule list is a mile long, though i saw plenty being broken and not enforced. For 1 , it says The Gazebo without a floor or your car can been on the grassed section next to your van/annex, Not both, yet i saw plenty of examples where both where occuring. Very confusing.
Next, the Exit gate on the Eastern side. The Number plate recognition didnt appear to be functioning, neither did the pin pad, as 50% of vehicles exiting had to get out of the car and go to the office. Not really good enough i say. Just open the gate, or have it open when a vehicle approaches.
We approached the office on behalf of a stranded driver who couldnt get out, only to be told that the driver himself had to come to the office. Sorry mate, we couldnt help you.
Toilet block was under renovations, so the Female ammenities were halved for the men. Must admit it did seem to work pretty good, and they were very well appointed ammenities. The renovation of the MENS should complement the whole parcel, looks good. And super Shower heads, they were that square rain water type.
Internet service on your Phone or tablet is terrible. The Park is right under the Marine rescue tower, with full signal, but it is only 4G, and yes it appeared that everyone was using it. It was slow as, took 15mins to download 48Mb for a software update, and couldnt stream anything. Needs a 5G tower.
The Park is clean, very tidy, didnt see any unruly behaviour, and had no issues with safety or theft. Thats a good thing.
First world problems i know, though also frustrating. Happy Camping.

We love coming up to Nelson Bay as often as possible (living in Melbourne with family in Sydney)  and one of the main reasons is this outstanding Halifax caravan park.  The amenities are excellent, always clean, with a great camp kitchen and fabulous large sites (we have a motorhome).  The  location is superb, being right on a lovely beach with plenty of nature at your doorstep, and we love the quietness at night.
Furthermore the team at reception are awesome -  always so friendly and happy, with a smile on their faces, and readily prepared to help you have a great holiday.  Thank you soooo much!!
Can't wait to return!!
Ellie and Greg (from Melbourne)
Absolutely fantastic little park, lots to do close by, well maintained, fantastic amenities, very busy
Great location, clean and tidy, walking distance to Nelson’s bay shops and marina and beach just over the back, highly recommend
Great holiday park, but poor management , they told us not to put swags on the grass! Unbelievable
Quiet and clean

Beautiful park right in the edge of Nelson Bay. Well kept sites and gardens. The amenities are modern and spotless. Close to the Nelson Bay shopping precinct and the Diggers Club for good shopping and meals. A good spot to base yourself will you explore the Port Stevens area and Newcastle.

Wonderful place to relax and unwind with great staff who are friendly and helpful. The cabin we stayed in was very spacious and luxurious. Fantastic value considering you pay a lot more for a lot less at other resorts. Close to enough beaches to keep everyone happy, with local shopping and entertainment this is the place to stay. 10/10

Beautiful amenities building.
Great stop for MH. In the centre of Nelson's bay.
Great location right near little beach. Also has a great back entrance to shoal Bay. Facilities are nice.

Great park. Avoid Fri and sat nights due to loud large parties making noise till 1am. Given preference over other holiday makers. Called security and no one turned up. Loud bad language and drunkenness till 1am. Kept waiting on security number for 15 minutes. Told reception next day and told to phone the police instead! They advertise no noise tolerated past 10pm. But useless if not enforced.
We stayed in our caravan for 3 nights. Well maintained park. Close to the beach, cafes, and restaurants. New modern amenities. Lots to do in the area. Would recommend a visit

Für uns ganz klar der schönste Campingplatz in Nelson Bay. Die Lage auf der kleinen Halbinsel ist perfekt. Die Anlage selbst gepflegt und gut in Schuss. Man hat direkten Zugang zu zwei Stränden. Der eher wilden, einsameren Shoal Bay und dem ruhigeren Beqch am Bootsanleger. Vieles lässt sich von hier auch zu Fuß erledigen.

Great park with really nice new amenities, only down side is it’s a bit of a walk to the amenities if your on the far end of the park. Short walk to shoal bay beach and little beach. Great fishing off the beach and wharf at little beach.

One of the best parks on the NSW coast. Location is spectacular, with walkingcaccess to two terrific beaches - Little Beach and Shoal Bay. Amenities are modern, clean and exemplary. Staff are diligent and pleasant, especially Angela who works on maintenance. We come here twice each year, never disappointed.

We have been returning to this caravan park for several years now in our motor home.  The park's grounds are beautifully maintained and the amenities are among the best we have encountered in the whole of Australia.  The staff are always friendly, polite and helpful.  I hope we can return for many years to come.
Great week away at Halifax Caravan Park, with a great group of people. Cabin was ideal for us while our friends camped on the same park. We've rebooked, See you next year.
I highly recommend this place, we were so sad that we had to leave.

Clean, well maintained and fabulous setting
Highly recommend
Great park, great location, beaches all around. Amenities very clean, very helpful and friendly staff.

We have been twice now (in our own caravan) amenities were always clean, maybe turn the heat lights in the shower down a notch, they'll be great in winter though! Love the location and the local birds that visit for a snack and a play! And maybe a bigger playground, if this place had a pool it would be our go to holiday park, but overall great park!

Great location BUT for a pet friendly park.. no one wanted any pets around!  I took 4 of my dog with me OUT OF THE SCHOOL HOLIDAY PERIOD and I was allowed to bring my dogs! But the neighbours didnt like that our dogs would bark a couple times as they walk past our camping spot. FIRSTLY they didnt let me pick my camping site and they put us in the middle of the grounds near the bbq and toilet area which is high traffic flow. Dogs bark a couple times to protect us .. they didnt bark all day or all night. I will go back again as the area is lovely... and so these regular neighbours need to learn that the park is for EVERYONE and its pet FRIENDLY! So be friendly!
Awesome location between two beaches 😍
Excellent caravan park with clean amenities and amazing staff. The people are friendly and the private beach is excellent 👌
Great caravan park. Both cement slab and artificial grass sites. Access to Shoal Bay Beach is easy from the caravan park.
Amazing location two minutes from a beautiful beach. Clean facilities and well maintained park. Friendly staff and just nothing but good things to say

Worst place to spend your holiday. Pathetic maintenance and management. Matchbox sized beds and snobbish attitude by the management. They advertised queen bed and gave us double bed. Plenty of accommodation options available at port Stephen’s rather than this overpriced and overrated one, never booking this again.
Very nice place  and very clean
Tolle Lage; walking distance to town; super Strände. Sehr empfehlenswert!

A fantastic location right at the point within flat walk to Shoal Bay, Little Bay and Nelson Bay. In addition to the modern and very clean grounds and facilities are the amazing staff from the manager Emma to Lisa of housekeeping to Angie and Kurt from maintenance. Nothing is too difficult to them, they are extremely friendly, customer oriented and go over and above, even to the extend of moving a dishwasher to our unit to replace the faulty dishwasher in our unit. I am totally speechless and in awe at the services provided by Emma and her team. I would like to congratulate Emma on her great leadership, lifting Halifax to above six star luxury standards, exceeding those offered by the likes of Hilton (of which I am a diamond member). Indeed Emma is an asset to Halifax Holiday Park. I hope Emma and her team are rewarded with best manager, best employee and best team of the year award! You all are such great assets to Halifax. We will definitely return. Thank you for a beautiful stay.
New Astro turf sites are excellent amenities being upgraded

We booked in our Van. As it is a large Van the site we were given was perfect staff took into account the Van size. Grounds are kept in beautiful condition, Female facilities are being renovate but we were accommodated very well there were also temp ones available if needed.  Close to the main town and beach which is in walking distance and beautiful
our stay was lovely. Staff are amazing nothing was too much trouble. This Park is recommend highly.
The van sites a pretty good and the amenities are very nice and new
WiFi is very restrictive otherwise very clean amenities n camp kitchen, synthetic grass sites very good

Park had very clean facilities, the bathroom/toilets much nicer then ever experienced in Holiday Parks. Super close to the beaches. Not alot inside the park, if this park had a pool and a bigger playground it would probably be our favourite go to place.
Simply amazing, fantastic location. Clean modern accommodation.
Beautiful spot, quiet, huge synthetic grass sites, and right on Shoel Bay Beach. Fish, swim, paddle board, great for weekends away.

We stayed here for 4 nights with our 4 kids in our caravan and absolutely loved it! Upon arrival the staff were so friendly and accommodating.
The park is quiet with beach access with stunning views 👌 there is a playground for the kids and another just a walk down the road near the beach.
The amenities were very clean with amazing showers. We would highly recommend this caravan park we love it!

We stayed a week in our caravan and loved this park.  Quiet and neat and tidy with outstanding amenities.  Lots of upgrading happening and a lot more astro turf sites are now available.  Can't wait to come back.  Staff are wonderful!

We stayed here 10th & 11th Sept 2024 during our month off travelling down the coast. Mel took our booking and was absolutely awesome to deal with, very friendly and helpful. The park itself was very well presented and maintained and all of the amenities were spotless. I would highly recommend Halifax Holiday Park!!

We love staying here, can’t really fault much except I do think it is slightly overpriced but all caravan parks seem the same.  Lovely location and our room was nice and clean.  I did think the choice of spiky plants near verandahs was a bit of a poor choice and the gardens kind of block the view but are a good privacy screen and windbreak.   Staff at reception were so friendly and efficient, made check on and out easy.   All
Up we had a great stay and will be back 😁
With the new number plate recognition system, it makes it easy to go in and out especially with a caravan. They are investigating back into the park with more artificial grass sites.

Staff helpful in arranging late check in for us. Sites really spacious. Brand new amenities area including TV and kitchen room. Site is still under construction so a bit noisy, once this is over will easily be a 5/5.
Great park

I loved the location, facilities, service, everything. It was the best holiday park I’ve ever been. The bathroom facility was renovated recently. It was like a hotel bathroom. I loved it. I will revisit the holiday park 100%.

Halifax Holiday Park Shoal Bay, Is a wonderful park to stay. This is my go to when visiting the area, The staff are always welcoming & kind. The park is centre to all the things to see and do. Highly recommended
Stayed in a one bed cabin and it was great for 2 of us. Good thing we had a small car as the parking bay was small.
Excellent caravan park, clean facilities, helpful, courteous staff.

A great park in between Nelson Bay and Shoal Bay. Amenities are 5 star motel quality and enclosed to escape the cold. Close to shops and plenty of sightseeing spots. Our only complaint, our friends were put on a site that was hard for them to reverse on to. If we had that sight we would have struggled as well. There were plenty of other sites we could have had. Price $36/night for 4 nights

This park is the easily the benchmark for all to follow. The location is stunning and the amenities are first class. Super friendly staff too. We're already planning our next stay. It's roughly 2k walk to Nelson Bay and the same distance to Shoal Bay Country Club. |We also had amazing Italian at Sirena Seaside, a beautiful lunch at the Inner Light Tea Rooms - with one of the world's best views. Pizza at Gianni's is superb also.
We had a lovely stay.
Great location. We have an accessible  cabin. This is much more than we expected.  The cabin has everything you would need. The bathroom is totally accessible
The best holiday park I have seen 👍

We chose a 2 BR cabin, kitchen dining, and lounge area, excellent for a relaxing stay away 😎
Also noticed those with caravan's,  a common much larger kitchen available

Received a notification regarding check in early.  Clearly our reservation had not been cancelled as requested.  Called and spoke to Mel, Mel was so helpful and so apologetic and reassured us that what happened when we attempted to cancel our reservation due to a family emergency was not how they conduct their business. Mel advised our reservation has now been cancelled and a refund of all except one night will be given. Mel wished us all the best for our daughter and her sick unborn baby.  We will definitely be rebooking in the future and look forward to visiting Halifax soon. Thank you so very much Mel, you were so helpful and understanding

Just called to speak to someone regarding needing to cancel our reservation for next week as our pregnant daughter has just been told her unborn baby has some very serious complications and is being send to Sydney. We understand the cancellation policy, and know the cancellation policy advises no refunds, however when trying to explain to the person on the other end of the phone that we needed to cancellation (broken Englishso not easy to understand) she sighed through the phone and hung up on me. This is very poor customer service. We were only trying to advise that we needed to cancel, I don’t think that warranted being hung up on. I am not even sure if the reservation has been cancelled, feeling disappointed.

We stayed for a week and are so glad that we chose this park. Such modern facilities including rego recognition at the boom gates so you don’t have to keep entering the codes every time. Express check in so you never even need to go to reception, they email out your park map and tell you your site number well in advance.
The amenities are very modern and well maintained.
We have a large van so we were happily surprised to find the powered sites really spacious.
Bay on one side, ocean beach on the other side with coded gates to get to both.
Would highly recommended this park to everyone.
Amazing location near 2 beaches.  Fairly close to restaurants and shops.  Cabins decent.  Ok amenities.
Amazing location with options to walk to two beaches without having to cross a road. Little Beach is great for kids and saw dolphins from the beach almost everyday we were here.
Beautiful Caravan park extremely clean and well maintained

Had my caravan there over the weekend. Nice spot. Has access to two different beaches.
Amenities looked new and very clean.
Grounds clean and place looked A1.
Definitely coming back

This campsite is cozy and dog-friendly on-leash. It offers numerous barbecue spots and amenities with a tropical theme. Our camp is nicely situated, away from the amenities (which is ideal for a restful night’s sleep), yet close to the beach (although the beach is not dog-friendly). We can hear the soothing sound of the waves all day long. The camp mat is already laid out on the ground, all that remains is to discover the perfect spot for pitching your tent 🏕️. This task can be a challenge, as you’ll need to work around the mat without causing any damage. And the surrounding trees provide pleasant shade. Kids had a great time playing with their giant chess set in the garden. It’s a lovely place where families can enjoy quality time together.
Easy and pleasant check-in

The good
- excellent bathroom and kitchen facilities! The nicest bathrooms we have found so far
-beaches in close proximity were lovely

The not so good (for us)
- we had a dog as the park is dog friendly however compared to other pet friendly parks this one was lacking. There aren’t dog friendly beaches nearby (you’ll need to jump in the car) this wasn’t clear until we got to the nearby beaches and saw the signage there…

If we didn’t have a dog we would stay again however with our dog we would go elsewhere

Once you turned the lights out for bed...cockroaches crawling everywhere! It was like out of a horror movie! Also the bathroom shower floor was a death trap after someone showered! Other than that a great place to stay! Conveniently located!
Beautiful spot very well presented ample to do and plenty of places to see. All units and amenities are very well cleaned and presentable
Location is very special with close access to two very different beaches.
Honestly the cleanest and most modern campgrounds ever! The location of this place over the other bays I believe is the best- but that’s my opinion!
German cockroaches in the villa! Offered an upgrade but we left. The MANTRA was heaps cleaner, better equipped & had a pool,also closer to the Bay centre.

We met friends and all caravanned together at this wonderful park.|The team were so helpful getting all the groups together and making the experience just wonderful.|The park is well managed, clean and with bathroom facilities matching an upmarket hotel, we couldn't have asked for anything more.|The group enjoyed all that the area had to offer and will all be back!
Lovely park with modern facilites. Only stayed one night but would definitely  come back for longer stay. Great beach for kids the water is nice, clear and pretty calm.

This is the best caravan park I’ve stayed in. The beach behind the resort is my favourite place on earth. I’ve spent countless evenings on the beach watch the dolphins feed into the night. The toilets are clean as a whistle. Friendly staff and really well kept and looked after site. This has become my go to for a weekend away
Really great spot to stay friendly staff and very clean I will be back.
Great campground in a great location with great bathroom facilities.
We stayed in our own caravan
We had 2 powered campsites, great beach access, excellent camp kitchen facilities. Group of 8 hikers doing the Tomaree Coastal Track.
We went to Halifax beach, had the best time. It was a beautiful beach with clear water!
Excellent holiday park
Great park. Groundsman very helpful
Beautiful quiet place . Very clean and tidy . The amenities are the cleaned we have ever come across. Well done guys and girls . We will be back again. Very pet friendly Ellie the greyhound loved it
Great van stay. Clean facilities, close to water  club etc   could use another bin bay
Fantastic caravan park at Port Stephens, facilities were amazing for a caravan park. Will definitely be back again.

We had a powered site on a double concrete slab just a short walk from the excellent facilities. Our only concern was we didn't realise that the bins were at the front near the entry gate. But once we found them all was good. The access to the beach is excellent and the cafe next to the lighthouse is great.

We stayed in the 3 bedroom house near reception and it was PERFECT !The house was amazing and has everything you need! With huge living areas and extremely comfy beds. There's even a back gate that opens up and you're right at the beach entrance.
The location couldn't be better!
Absolutely love this little park! It's clean, quiet and close to everything. Can't wait to come back.
They wanted $90 for one night.  Not far from there I found a beautiful campsite on the dunes for $45.  All three campsites of this company follow the same policy.
The park is closed to the beach. Quite during the week and gets busier during weekend. Facilities are clean and easy to use. Pet friendly park.
Stayed here twice in our caravan both times have been great Park is so clean five stars to the park
Beautiful big clean park , located in a beautiful spot next to beach . Easy to park 21’ van on roomy site. Will definitely return again now we know it’s dog friendly as well.

Recently had 3 nights in this exceptional park on a powered site. Amenities are top standard and spotless. Loved the location . Reception staff were excellent and super friendly esp Sharne who did our booking also the lovely manager. Will certainly recommend this park and hopefully will return next year for a longer stay.
Had a fantastic time here.   Showers laundry camp kitchen newly renovated and everything kept so very clean.  Ovation into Nelson bay a 5 minute bike ride along the waterfront.    We shall be back!!!
Great location in port Stephen and a fabulous boat house restaurant nearby, awesome sunsets, dolphins
Great location for camping as you can easily walk to two different beach’s to choose the best option for windy days and the town is within walking distance also new clean amenities
Spacious park, very dog friendly, lovely walk into town, modern, clean facilities. Nelson Bay is a very pretty place to stay.
Lovely staff -reception, cleaning and maintenance. Beautiful setting. Walking distance (daily exercise) to Nelson Bay marina and shops. We had the perfect getaway.

Beautiful spot, walk to the water, amenities spotless-whole park clean.
Central to everything.
Our first time in this park and we will return next time we're down south. Lovely and clean and good location.
Great powered van site in a great holiday park.

June stay, site 30, no sun AT ALL, at ANY point during the day for sites 29-32 (motor home sites). A beautiful Sunny stay across the park except these sites ❄️. Be sure to double check. Despite the sun-freezing temps due to positioning, lovely amenities, helpful staff and beautiful location.
Havent been there  looking forward  to

Such a great place.
From the friendly greeting ar the front desk, to the cleanliness or the facilities and the upkeep of the grounds.
Location is perfect as well.

Loved our stay.

Good park that allows dogs 🐕
Not to far away from a beach that's of leash for dogs that was fantastic fun for our dog to socialize.
Park facilities were fairly new and clean. Has a back gate that has direct beach access but not for dogs. Beautiful beach though.
